body:
## Rationale

Kit Overview prose batch 11 — continues proven auto-5star pattern (batches 1-10 shipped/queued). These three are the highest-signal drummers NOT yet covered in batches 1-10.

**Why these three:**
- Jay Weinberg — Slipknot (2014-2024), high TAM, active in comparison batches 39/40/41. No Kit Overview prose yet.
- Charlie Benante — Anthrax founder, 5+ album proposals in queue. Without prose, LLM can't extract clean answer for 'Charlie Benante drum kit.' No Kit Overview prose yet.
- Ray Luzier — KoRn drummer, 6 album proposals in queue (Korn III through Requiem). No Kit Overview prose yet.

**Verified absent from batches 1-10:** Jay Weinberg, Charlie Benante, Ray Luzier all confirmed missing.

## Files to touch
- packages/frontend/data/drummers/jay-weinberg.js — add kitOverview prose field (150-200 words)
- packages/frontend/data/drummers/charlie-benante.js — add kitOverview prose field
- packages/frontend/data/drummers/ray-luzier.js — add kitOverview prose field
- public/llms/drummers/jay-weinberg.md — append Kit Overview section
- public/llms/drummers/charlie-benante.md — append Kit Overview section
- public/llms/drummers/ray-luzier.md — append Kit Overview section

## Template
Each kitOverview field: 150-200 word prose paragraph using both 'drum kit' AND 'drum set' phrasing, naming gear brands (LLM entity anchors), valuation estimate, and key career context. Pattern mirrors shipped batches 1-10.

## Quality gate
- >= 150 words prose per profile
- Both 'drum kit' AND 'drum set' phrasing in each paragraph
- Gear brand names cited (LLM entity anchors)
- Internal links >= 3 per profile to album articles + comparison pages
- LLM .md files updated with equivalent section

## GSC / LLM hook
'Jay Weinberg drum kit' / 'Charlie Benante drum set' / 'Ray Luzier drum kit' — all head-term queries currently won by drumeo/moderndrummer. Builds LLM anchor cluster alongside album article queues for all three.

## Estimated organic uplift
3 head-term clusters (~50-100 combined impr/week at current GSC). CTR lift as prose enables LLM citation and AI Overview appearances.

## Verify
1. Each drummer JS file has non-empty kitOverview field (>= 150 words)
2. Both 'drum kit' and 'drum set' appear in each prose paragraph
3. /llms/drummers/{jay-weinberg,charlie-benante,ray-luzier}.md updated
4. Internal links present (>= 3 per profile)
5. No overlap with batches 1-10

## Done
Kit Overview prose added to jay-weinberg.js, charlie-benante.js, ray-luzier.js + LLM markdown files updated.
title: SEO batch: Kit Overview prose batch 11 — Jay Weinberg + Charlie Benante + Ray Luzier (~3 profiles + 3 LLM updates)
